Narmeen Zain
  • PORTFOLIO
  • ABOUT

Hii

I'm an award-winning, internationally exhibited artist. I've been exhibiting since 2011 and mostly paint with oils and acrylics but sometimes create mixed media pieces with embroidery or knit work. I also very occasionally sculpt with ceramic clay.

Outside of art, I'm a computer scientist and classically trained pianist.

Say hello!

GALLERY REPRESENTATION

DIAC

Dubai, UAE

ISOAG

Dubai, UAE

ABOUT THE ART

I started learning to paint with acrylics but ended up gravitating towards oils for the depth and richness of colour. These days, I'm experimenting more with mixed media and sculpture.

Above all, I value connection and emotion in my work. The viewer, then, becomes vital. I am looking for acceptance and reciprocity and connection. The message doesn't exist unless it's in the act of being perceived.

ARTIST STATEMENT

I think people, places, objects, are only as obedient to their outlines as we expect them to be. There's a volatility there that I sometimes forget. Objects don't exist in isolation. The links between them are hard for me to put into words but I know that we overlap more than we are separate. When I look into a mirror my face is broken into billions of others. My work relies on this enmeshment.

I have said before that many of my paintings begin in dreams. I am using paint and thread now to show them to you. There is something to be said that exists outside the bounds of language. I've said it as best I can.

SELECTED EXHIBITIONS

2024 Emozion, Gadarte Associazione Culturale, Florence, Italy

2024 Telavi History Museum, Telavi, Georgia

2023 ISOAG Annual Art Exhibition, Dubai, UAE

2023 One World One Earth, Taj Mahal Palace Hotel, Mumbai, India

2023 Annual Exhibition, Rukseen Art Gallery, Dubai, United Arab Emirates

2023 Vasudhaiv Kutumbakam, Indian Embassy, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates

2023 A Journey Through Creativity, Hotel H, Dubai, United Arab Emirates

2012–2014 Permanently exhibited, ArtChowk — the Gallery, Karachi, Pakistan

2014 Students' Exhibition, Gallery 76, Dubai, United Arab Emirates

SELECTED PRESS

2024 Canvas of Artist Memories Autobiography Coffee Table Book, published by Namaste India Magazine

2023 Gulf Today, "The Art of Dreams: Computer scientist Narmeen Zain teams with dreams for art"

DISTINCTIONS

2013 Juror's Choice, Gallery 72

2011 First Place, Gallery 72
